Mithril Edged Skull Splitter  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 45
DMG: 33 Dmg Bonus: 155
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +3 DEX: +3 AGI: +3
SV DISEASE: +4 SV COLD: +4 SV MAGIC: +4
WT: 8.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

# Sep 22 2002 at 7:20 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759773734
112 posts
Verant spelled "Mithril" wrong.

*sigh*

Just tried searching it up and got over a hundred items spelled "mithril" but not this one no.

I just bought it for my SK for 1500pp. Awesome axe. Goes cheap in the bazaar too.

Where it Drops
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2002 at 4:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592254940873
View User Forum
11 posts
I saw below in some of the posts that people were wondering where this drops: I got mine in Dragon Necropolis..but the other I've seen on Xev was dropped in Skyshrine (so effectively it appears to be dragon loot specifically). If anyone else has seen one drop in another zone, please post! (And yes the axe graphic is dull but that makes it a larger and more fun surpise when you hit for 200 with it in later levels).
▲ Page top
PC on Veeshan
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2002 at 12:10 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759552183
33 posts
This thing has been on auction in bazaar for 2k over the last several days (love the new UI btw). I'd have bought it but blew all my pp on other upgrades. Seems like a reasonable price to me though obviously well below some of the other prices listed here per other servers. However, the fact that it's been available for some time leads me to believe that 2k may even be a little high for Veeshan. Anyway, for what it's worth, there's what info I have...

I'm a level 51 Paladin and I have one of these. The damage is incredable. My str is 164 and I hit for average damage of 85 and max damage of 140. With 30% of the hits being over 100. I retired my Wurmslayer - Shield of the Water Dragon combo to do some real damage.

Mythril.. Mithril?
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2001 at 8:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756923739
18 posts
Pick a spelling Verant ;)
▲ Page top
RE: Mythril.. Mithril?
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2001 at 1:58 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Proper spelling is Mythril. . . but thats of the base metal before is folded. Once folded and tempered its known as mithril, but still often called Mythril, as MYTh still leads those skeptics to believe its not real, but infact a very old and rare ore almost depleated in the realms.

Sorry this is just all common knowledge for AD&D buffs hehe, was a weapons master in AD&D with my warrior, and sorta learned reasons of why things names varry some place to place.

513 posts
This is a sweet weapon!

You people who keep drooling over the 32/39 weapons keep forgetting that the damage bonus applies to weapons with a delay of 40 or greater!
▲ Page top
uhh...
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2001 at 1:40 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i havent played much recently... what damage bonus?
▲ Page top
Weapon Delays and Damage Bonus
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2001 at 6:23 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Awhile back Verant adjusted the damage level of 2h weapons. Essectially if the delay of the weapon was 40+ then there was I think a 10% dmg bonus added. If the weapon fell between 30 and 39 then no dmg bonus was applied, and if the weapon was below 29 delay then it suffered a 10% dmg reduction.

So many items with 40 delay are heavily sought after cause that is the lowest delay you can have and yet still get the bonus applied.

PS I know 40 delay is the correct number for the dmg bonus but I'm not 100% sure on 29- being the damage penalty.
▲ Page top
RE: Weapon Delays and Damage Bonus
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2001 at 8:05 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i dont know about the damage reduction on lower then 29 but my friends 51st ranger with a Silver Swiftblade (2HS 16/24) hits in the upper 70's with only like 125-130 str...not that 10% more or les would make *that* much of a difference...70ish damage at a 24 delay ratio is nice...
▲ Page top
RE: Weapon Delays and Damage Bonus
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2001 at 4:58 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750926490
95 posts
I believe the max damage is larger on higher delay weapons, as in a 20/40 weapon won't do the same maximum damage as a 20/50 weapon.
▲ Page top
RE: Weapon Delays and Damage Bonus
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2001 at 9:08 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757008821
2 posts
Just wondering... do you (or anyone) know if haste affects this? Like say you have a 20dmg 40delay 2hs and a Flowing Black Silk Sash... do you still get the bonus? Or because now the delay is below 40 you no longer get the bonus? Just curious (since I have a Mithril 2 hander 21/40 with perm haste for those that don't know).

-Buto
